metadata.review_notes: Medium and Low priority issues - complete backlog

tasks.title: Refactor ExecutionTracker god class into focused components

files_to_modify.description: Split 684-line class into SessionManager, WorkflowTracker, AgentTracker, MetricsAggregator

core_functionality: Create SessionManager for session stack handling
testing: Unit tests for each new class

tasks.implementation_guidance: Extract methods into focused classes. Use composition pattern. Maintain existing public API.
tasks.test_strategy: Test each component independently. Verify integration maintains current behavior.

tasks.title: Replace long parameter lists with configuration objects
tasks.implementation_guidance: Use @dataclass. Provide from_dict() method. Support both config object and **kwargs.
tasks.test_strategy: Test both old and new calling patterns. Verify all parameters validated.

tasks.title: Extract magic numbers to named constants

core_functionality: Create constants for all magic numbers

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create module-level or class-level constants. Add docstrings explaining values. Consider making configurable.
tasks.test_strategy: Verify all hardcoded values replaced. Test with different values to ensure configurability works.

tasks.title: Replace Any type hints with specific types

core_functionality: Replace with specific types or protocols
Add TypeVar for generics where needed
testing: mypy passes with no Any warnings

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use Protocol for interface types. Use TypeVar for generics. Import from typing.
tasks.test_strategy: Run mypy with --strict. Verify IDE type checking. Test with various types.

tasks.title: Move SQL-specific logic from tracker to backend
tasks.implementation_guidance: Define abstract method in base. Implement in SQL backend. Call from tracker.
tasks.test_strategy: Unit tests for each backend. Integration tests for metric accuracy.

tasks.title: Extract duplicate agent/stage name extraction logic
tasks.implementation_guidance: Create utils.py with extract_agent_name() and extract_stage_name(). Handle str, dict, and object types.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all input formats. Verify consistent behavior across modules.

tasks.title: Refactor parallel executor execute_stage method
tasks.implementation_guidance: Extract logical sections into private methods. Keep execute_stage() as orchestrator.
tasks.test_strategy: Unit test each extracted method. Integration tests verify overall behavior.

tasks.title: Standardize error handling patterns across modules
tasks.implementation_guidance: Document error handling strategy. Create exception hierarchy. Update all handlers to be specific.
tasks.test_strategy: Test each error path. Verify exceptions logged correctly. Check propagation.

tasks.title: Implement proper deprecation for api_key field

files_to_modify.description: Add version-based migration and ERROR-level warnings

core_functionality: Raise error if both fields specified
Log at ERROR level for visibility

tasks.implementation_guidance: Update model_validator. Check for both fields. Use logger.error() for deprecation. Document in migration guide.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all combinations. Verify errors/warnings appear. Check migration path documented.

tasks.title: Add type validation before coercion in metrics

files_to_modify.description: Add type checking before float() coercion

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add try-except around coercion. Check isinstance(value, (int, float)). Log warnings for skipped metrics.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with various invalid types. Verify warnings logged. Ensure processing continues.

tasks.title: Replace MD5 with modern hash function

files_to_modify.description: Replace MD5 with SHA256 or xxHash

core_functionality: Add comment explaining crypto strength not required
Update tests if hash values hardcoded

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use hashlib.sha256(). Add comment about determinism vs security. Consider xxHash for performance.
tasks.test_strategy: Verify same input produces same hash. Check variant distribution unchanged.

tasks.title: Create configurable pricing system for LLM costs

core_functionality: Fall back to defaults with warnings

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create pricing config file. Load at initialization. Use model prefix matching. Add version/date tracking.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with different models. Update pricing and verify reload. Test fallback.

tasks.title: Implement cache invalidation for experiments

files_to_modify.description: Add cache TTL and invalidation logic

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add timestamp to cache entries. Check TTL on access. Invalidate cache on mutations. Add metrics.
tasks.test_strategy: Test cache expiration. Update experiment and verify cache cleared. Test metrics.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting for LLM API calls

core_functionality: Token bucket rate limiter per provider

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create RateLimiter class. Add to each provider. Track costs. Implement circuit breaker on budget.
tasks.test_strategy: Generate burst traffic. Verify rate limiting. Test budget limits. Check alerts.

tasks.title: Use secrets module for cryptographic randomness

files_to_modify.description: Replace random with secrets for variant selection

tasks.implementation_guidance: Import secrets. Use secrets.SystemRandom().choices(). Add docstring about crypto security.
tasks.test_strategy: Test variant distribution. Verify unpredictability. Check performance impact minimal.

tasks.title: Improve SQL injection sanitizer precision

files_to_modify.description: Use word boundaries and more precise patterns

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use \b for word boundaries. Document parameterized queries as primary defense. Add warning docstring.
tasks.test_strategy: Test legitimate use cases. Verify SQL injection still blocked. Check false positive rate <5%.

tasks.title: Make weak consensus penalty configurable

core_functionality: Use instance variable instead of constant

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add parameter to __init__. Store as instance variable. Update synthesize() to use it. Document reasoning.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with penalty=0.5, 0.7, 1.0. Verify confidence calculations correct.

tasks.title: Fix thread pool leak in ToolExecutor destructor

core_functionality: Log critical warning if cleanup fails
Include executor_id and worker_count in logs
testing: Test destructor called without explicit shutdown

tasks.implementation_guidance: In __del__, call executor.shutdown(wait=False, cancel_futures=True). Log failures at CRITICAL level.
tasks.test_strategy: Create executor without closing. Trigger GC. Verify threads cleaned. Check logs.

tasks.title: Extract template method for conflict resolution

core_functionality: Extract common logic (validate, filter, build result)

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create template method in ConflictResolutionStrategy. Pass winner_selector as Callable. Extract common code.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all resolvers. Verify identical behavior. Check DRY principle satisfied.

tasks.review_note: Optional - can be skipped if examples are valuable
tasks.title: Move complex docstring examples to separate files
tasks.implementation_guidance: Move lengthy examples to files. Keep simple examples in docstrings. Use doctest for validation.
tasks.test_strategy: Run doctest. Execute example files. Verify documentation still clear.

tasks.title: Standardize logging levels across codebase

testing: Review log output at each level

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create guidelines doc. Audit all logging calls. Move routine logs to DEBUG. Add sampling for frequent logs.
tasks.test_strategy: Run in production mode. Review log volume. Verify important events visible.

tasks.title: Complete type hints coverage across codebase

testing: Type errors caught at dev time

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use TypeVar for generic types. Add Protocol for interfaces. Import from typing. Run mypy regularly.
tasks.test_strategy: Run mypy --strict. Fix all errors. Verify IDE type checking improves.

tasks.title: Fix inconsistent naming conventions
tasks.implementation_guidance: Rename methods/functions. Extract constants. Update all references. Update documentation.
tasks.test_strategy: Search for all usages. Verify tests pass. Check documentation updated.

tasks.title: Add __all__ exports to __init__ files
tasks.implementation_guidance: Add __all__ list. Import public classes. Add module docstring. Document API.
tasks.test_strategy: Test from X import *. Verify only intended items exported. Check docs.

tasks.title: Remove unused imports and organize imports
tasks.implementation_guidance: Run isort. Remove unused. Configure isort in pyproject.toml. Add pre-commit hook.
tasks.test_strategy: Run pylint/flake8 for unused imports. Run isort --check. Verify tests pass.

tasks.title: Replace magic strings with enums
tasks.implementation_guidance: Create enum.Enum subclass. Replace string literals with enum members. Use .value for storage.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all enum values. Verify type checking. Check IDE autocomplete.

tasks.title: Make package paths auto-detectable
tasks.implementation_guidance: Use inspect.getmodule(). Extract __package__. Provide tools_package parameter for override.
tasks.test_strategy: Test discovery from various locations. Verify correct package detected. Test override works.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive validation in dataclass __post_init__

core_functionality: Validate reasoning is string and non-empty

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add validation in __post_init__. Raise ValueError for None. Use warnings.warn() for empty reasoning.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all invalid inputs. Verify errors raised. Check warnings appear.

tasks.title: Add resource limits to Calculator tool

files_to_modify.description: Add value limits, expression length, AST depth checks

tasks.implementation_guidance: Define constants. Check lengths before parsing. Implement _get_ast_depth(). Handle OverflowError.
tasks.test_strategy: Test DoS vectors (9**9**9, nested operations). Verify graceful errors. Check performance.

tasks.title: Extract duplicate validation logic to decorators

files_to_modify.description: Create validation decorator, use across methods

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create decorator that wraps methods. Check input_data and context types. Raise TypeError with clear messages.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all decorated methods. Verify validation consistent. Check error messages clear.

tasks.title: Upgrade template cache to proper LRU implementation

files_to_modify.description: Replace dict cache with functools.lru_cache or cachetools

core_functionality: Implement cache warming for hot templates

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use @lru_cache decorator or cachetools.LRUCache. Add size tracking. Implement cache warming.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with >maxsize templates. Verify LRU eviction. Check memory usage. Test metrics.

tasks.title: Add health check endpoints to services
tasks.implementation_guidance: Create health() method. Test DB connection. Test cache. Return dict with status, checks, timestamp.
tasks.test_strategy: Mock DB/cache failures. Verify health status correct. Test with orchestration tools.

tasks.title: Standardize TTL handling across cache backends
tasks.implementation_guidance: Add TTL validation. Warn on invalid values. Treat <=0 as None. Document in set() method.
tasks.test_strategy: Test all TTL edge cases. Verify consistent behavior. Check documentation.

tasks.title: Add namespace prefix to cache keys

files_to_modify.description: Add namespace parameter and prefix keys

core_functionality: Support multiple applications on same cache

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add namespace to __init__. Prefix in generate_key(). Test isolation.
tasks.test_strategy: Create two caches with different namespaces. Verify isolation. Test shared backend.

tasks.title: Improve Redis error handling specificity

core_functionality: Different log levels for different errors

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add specific exception handlers. Use appropriate log levels. Re-raise auth errors.
tasks.test_strategy: Mock different Redis failures. Verify correct exception handling. Check logs.

tasks.title: Add logging to silent callback failures

core_functionality: Log callback exceptions at ERROR level

tasks.implementation_guidance: Replace except Exception: pass with logging. Include callback.__name__. Add exc_info=True.
tasks.test_strategy: Create callbacks that raise. Verify logged. Check processing continues.

tasks.title: Sanitize sensitive data in CLI output

core_functionality: Redact sensitive keys (api_key, password, token, secret)

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create sanitization method. Check for sensitive key names. Replace with ***REDACTED***.
tasks.test_strategy: Create actions with api_key. Display and verify redacted. Test various key names.

tasks.title: Standardize CLI error handling
tasks.implementation_guidance: Create error handler with operation parameter. Switch on exception type. Format consistently.
tasks.test_strategy: Trigger various errors. Verify messages consistent. Check logging.

tasks.review_note: Low priority - can be done incrementally
tasks.title: Add missing docstrings to private methods

core_functionality: Add docstrings to all private methods

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add Google-style docstrings. Include Args, Returns, Raises. Document behavior.
tasks.test_strategy: Generate docs. Review coverage. Check clarity.

tasks.title: Add JSON serialization error handling

core_functionality: Fallback to repr() for non-serializable values

tasks.implementation_guidance: Wrap json.dumps in try-except. On TypeError, use repr() for problematic values. Log warning.
tasks.test_strategy: Pass non-serializable objects. Verify fallback works. Check key uniqueness.

tasks.title: Standardize get_stats schema across backends

core_functionality: Add size, max_size, evictions to Redis stats
Use -1 or null for unavailable metrics

tasks.implementation_guidance: Add backend-specific stats. Use -1 for N/A. Document expected schema.
tasks.test_strategy: Call get_stats on both backends. Verify schema matches. Check documentation.
